submission.implementation_notes: Scalus 0.18.2 Fibonacci program computing `fib(n)` by naive (exponential) recursion (`Data -> Unit`), compiled with Scalus default options (no optimization). An AST-level alpha-rename pass rewrites all generated identifiers to short purely-alphabetic names before serialisation, keeping the artifact compatible with the plutus-core 1.45.0.0 textual parser.
